operate(int, int, int, MifareClassic.OperationCommand) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic

Original Transaction Type, i.e.
OseToPpse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
0 - Normal flow (default)
1 - Stop vas and do payment directly
